description: An ordered sourcing-preference entry for an item: which source type (manufactured, purchased, subcontracted, stock-transfer) to use and at what priority rank. An item has one or more entries; the set is replaced wholesale on item update. Each entry is unique within the item by priority and by source type. Drives the sourcing decision (make-vs-buy-vs-subcontract-vs-transfer) when demand for the item arises.

fields.name: itemId
fields.label: Item
fields.validation: set from the parent item; entry belongs to exactly one item; the source-priority set is replaced wholesale (not merged) on item update
fields.purpose: Binds the sourcing-preference entry to its item so the make-vs-buy ranking resolves per item; replace-on-update keeps the ranking set internally consistent (no orphaned or duplicate ranks after an edit).

fields.name: priority
fields.label: Priority
fields.validation: integer rank (lower = preferred); unique within the item: unique (itemId, priority)
fields.purpose: The rank that orders the source types for the item so sourcing tries the most-preferred source first and falls back in order; uniqueness per item guarantees an unambiguous ranking.

fields.name: sourceType
fields.label: Source Type
fields.validation: one of the enum (MANUFACTURED | PURCHASED | SUBCONTRACTED | STOCK_TRANSFER); unique within the item: unique (itemId, sourceType)
fields.purpose: Names how the item is sourced at this rank (make in-house, buy from a supplier, subcontract, or transfer from another stock location); the controlled value that the sourcing engine acts on; uniqueness per item prevents listing the same source type twice.

invariants: A10 the source-priority set is replaced wholesale on item update (which reverts the item to PENDING_APPROVAL)
A13 audit (category ADMIN) + SSE on every change
